features: **Exploring** — Navigate unfamiliar code using the knowledge graph
**Impact Analysis** — Analyze blast radius before changes
**Refactoring** — Plan safe refactors using dependency mapping
install_hints: > **Recommended for fastest startup:** install gitnexus globally (`npm i -g gitnexus`) and run `gitnexus setup` — this writes an absolute-pa
